title: Packs / Xananode Canonical / Nodes / Schema Node Type Source
summary: packs/xananode-canonical/nodes/schema_node-type-source.json is preserved as a raw Core SDK source artifact in the XanaNode Core SDK substrate.
content:
{
  "id": "xananode.canonical:schema/node-type-source",
  "title": "Source",
  "type": "schema",
  "subtype": "node_type_schema",
  "importance": 5,
  "summary": "A reference work, transcript, paper, book, talk, article, dataset, or primary evidence item.",
  "version": "0.3.0",

    "notice"
  ],
  "required_frontmatter": [
    "title",

    "importance",

  ],
  "recommended_frontmatter": [

  "color": {
